title: Tala Classic 1 Hour White Mechanical Timer, 60 Minute Adjustable Timer with Loud Ringer, Perfect for your Cooking and Baking needs, Made using BPA Free Plastic
features: COUNTDOWN TIMER: This classic timer is an essential items for any home baker, This timers works up 60 minutes and features a loud ring
ACTIVATE: To ensure the Timer rings you will need to adjust the Timer to the full amount of time (60 Minutes) and then adjust back to your required amount of time, This activates the mechanism
BATTERY FREE: This timer works without the need of A battery
MULTI POSITION: Fitted with a Clip and a Magnet this item can be positioned all around the Kitchen and can either Stand, Be Clipped to something or be stuck to something with the Magnet
TRIED AND TESTED: Tala has been supplying Kitchenware Gadgets since 1899
